title: Senior Teacher - Coursera India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Coursera India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Coursera India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Coursera India:
Coursera India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Coursera India!
